title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, shares his bootstrapping playbook after reaching $10M ARR with no external funding. The interview covers 15 topics including strategies for hitting $1M ARR in 117 days, reducing churn, pricing experimentation, and decision-making frameworks for growth-stage startups.
